title: Excuse Machine
spec: Button generates an absurd excuse by combining random clause arrays ('I would have, but...'). Big reveal text, copy button.

title: Band Name Forge
spec: Combine random adjective+noun + random genre tag. Show as gig poster style. New name on click.

title: Bard Burn
spec: Classic 3-column Shakespearean insult generator ('Thou '+col1+col2+col3+'!'). Old-parchment styling.

title: Conspiracy Generator
blurb: Connect the dots nobody asked for.
spec: Builds a ridiculous conspiracy sentence joining random secret groups + objects + verbs. Red-string corkboard vibe.

title: Startup Mad Libs
spec: Generates 'It's like {app} for {thing}, powered by {buzzword}.' plus fake valuation. Pitch-deck card.

title: Evil Plan Generator
spec: Generates a 3-step supervillain scheme from random arrays. Menacing dark theme, lair lighting.

title: Cheesy Pickup Lines
spec: Random cheesy pickup line on click. Heart particles float up on generate.

title: Dad Joke Dispenser
spec: Shows joke setup, click to reveal punchline with a rimshot/groan emoji. Array of original dad jokes.

title: Compliment Cannon
spec: Fires a wholesome compliment on click with confetti. Warm gradient, feel-good copy.

title: Rap Name Generator
spec: Generates rap names (Lil/Big/Young + word, or word+'$' styling). Gold chain bling styling.

title: Superhero Generator
spec: Generates hero name + superpower + comedic weakness. Comic-book panel styling with action lines.

title: Villain Namer
spec: Generates a villain title (Doctor/Baron/Lord + ominous noun) + evil tagline. Dark dramatic card.

title: Fake Cocktail Names
spec: Generates a fancy cocktail name + fake ingredients list. Speakeasy menu styling.

title: Sci-Fi Planet Namer
blurb: Boldly name where none have named.
spec: Generates exoplanet name (e.g. 'Zorblax-7b') + a wacky fact about it. Starry background.

title: Funny WiFi Names
spec: Generates a punny wifi network name. Shows it inside a fake wifi-list UI row. Copy button.

title: Corporate BS Generator
spec: Generates a meaningless corporate buzzword sentence. 'Sounds smart' meter. Clean office styling.

title: Fortune Cookie
blurb: Crack it open. Trust the slip.
spec: Click a cookie, it cracks (CSS) and a fortune slip slides out + lucky numbers. New cookie button.

title: Pet Name Generator
spec: Pick species (dropdown), generate a fitting silly pet name. Paw-print decorations.

title: Ship Name Combiner
spec: Two text inputs (names), blends them into a couple 'ship' name (Brad+Angelina=Brangelina). Heart styling.

title: Mëtal Bänd Generator
spec: Generates an ominous metal band name, adds random umlauts, jagged blackletter styling, dark theme.

title: Cosmic Conch
spec: Magic 8-ball: input a question, shake animation, reveals an answer in the triangle window. Classic + funny answers.

title: The Oracle
spec: Big button -> dramatically flashes a giant YES or NO with sound-free screen flash + verdict subtitle.

title: Spin the Wheel
spec: Canvas wheel of custom options (editable list), spins with easing, lands on a winner. Confetti on stop.

title: Coin Flipper
blurb: Heads or tails, fate or fail.
spec: CSS 3D-ish coin flip animation, lands heads/tails, keeps a running tally.

title: Polyhedral Dice
blurb: d4 to d20, roll for it.
spec: Pick die type and count, roll button shows individual results + total with a tumble animation.

title: Raffle Picker
blurb: One name to rule the draw.
spec: Paste a list of names (one per line), 'Draw!' cycles through fast then lands on a random winner.

title: Roshambo
spec: Play rock/paper/scissors vs CPU. Emoji throws, win/loss/draw, running scoreboard.

title: Higher or Lower
spec: CPU picks 1-100, you guess, it says higher/lower, counts attempts, win screen.

title: Truth or Dare
spec: Two buttons: Truth / Dare. Each pulls a random (clean, party-safe) prompt. Spinner flair.

title: Would You Rather
spec: Generates a 'Would you rather A or B?' from option arrays. Two big choice buttons, shows fake % of people.

title: MoCkInG TeXt
spec: Live textarea -> alternating upper/lower case output. Copy button + meme mascot vibe.

title: Zalgo Curse
spec: Adds combining diacritic chaos to input text, intensity slider. Copy output. Creepy theme.

title: ASCII Banner
spec: Type text -> render as large ASCII block letters using a built-in 5-row figlet-style font map (A-Z,0-9,space). Mono output, copy.

title: Pig Latin
spec: Translate text to Pig Latin per standard rules. Live output + copy.

title: Emoji-fy
spec: Replace known words (dictionary map) in text with matching emoji. Live output.

title: Ｖａｐｏｒｗａｖｅ
spec: Convert ASCII to fullwidth unicode characters. Vaporwave pink/cyan grid styling. Copy.

title: L33t Sp34k
spec: Translate text to leetspeak (letter->number/symbol map). Live output, hacker green terminal theme.

title: Morse Code
spec: Text<->Morse converter both directions, plus a 'play' button that beeps the morse via WebAudio.

title: Upside Down
spec: Map characters to upside-down unicode and reverse the string. Copy output.

title: UwU-ifier
spec: Owoify text: r/l->w, add stutters and 'uwu/owo' interjections. Live output, cutesy theme.

title: 👏 Clap 👏 Text
spec: Insert a chosen emoji between every word (selectable emoji). Live output + copy.

title: Binary Translator
spec: Convert text<->binary (8-bit per char). Two-way, copy. Mono terminal styling.

title: Cipher Wheel
spec: Caesar cipher with a shift slider (0-25, 13=ROT13). Live encode/decode of input. Decoder-ring graphic.

title: Mirror Text
spec: Reverse the string; also a CSS-mirrored preview. Copy reversed text.

title: Bubble Wrap
spec: Grid of bubbles; click to pop each (CSS depress + pop sound via WebAudio). 'Repackage' button refills. Pop counter.

title: Etch A Sketch
spec: Canvas line drawing controlled by arrow keys (and on-screen knobs). 'Shake' button clears with a shake animation. Red frame.

title: Spirograph
spec: Draw spirograph curves on canvas from R/r/d sliders, random colors. 'Draw' animates the curve, 'clear'.

title: Pixel Paint
spec: 16x16 clickable grid, color palette, drag to paint, eraser, clear. Tiny pixel-art studio.

title: Warp Starfield
spec: Canvas starfield warp screensaver; mouse/scroll changes speed. Fullscreen black.

title: Matrix Rain
spec: Classic green falling katakana/character rain on canvas. Speed slider.

title: Click Fireworks
blurb: Tap the sky, make it boom.
spec: Click anywhere to launch fireworks particle bursts on canvas. Night sky. Gravity + fade.

title: Bouncing DVD
spec: A DVD-style logo bounces around, changing color on wall hits. Counts perfect corner hits with celebration.

title: Kaleidoscope
spec: Mouse movement draws mirrored radial-symmetry patterns on canvas. Random colors, clear button.

title: Lava Lamp
spec: Canvas metaball blobs rising/falling with warm gradient glow. Click to change color scheme.

title: Virtual Fish Tank
spec: Canvas with a few emoji/vector fish swimming, bubbles rising. Click to feed (flakes drift down, fish chase).

title: Game of Life
spec: Conway's Game of Life on a canvas grid. Click cells to toggle, play/pause/step/random/clear, speed.

title: Falling Sand
spec: Falling-sand cellular automaton: draw sand/water/wall with mouse; particles settle. Material picker, clear.

title: Flocking Boids
spec: Boids flocking simulation on canvas (separation/alignment/cohesion). Mouse repels/attracts the flock.

title: Confetti Button
spec: A giant button that erupts physics confetti from the click point each press. Just delightful.

title: Snow Globe
spec: A cozy scene in a globe; 'Shake' button swirls snow particles that settle. Repeat forever.

title: Plasma Field
spec: Animated sine-based plasma effect on canvas, shifting palette. Hypnotic, fullscreen.

title: Rainbow Trail
spec: Mouse leaves a fading rainbow particle trail across the page. Clear-on-idle. Playful.

title: Newton's Cradle
spec: Animated Newton's cradle (5 balls) with swinging physics; pull-and-release with mouse, slider for ball count.

title: Disco Mode
blurb: Turn any room into a club.
spec: Fullscreen flashing disco colors + rotating light beams + a spinning disco ball. BPM slider. Party!

title: Sparkle Cursor
spec: Replaces cursor with a magic wand emitting star sparkles that fall and fade. Nostalgic 2003 vibe.

title: Ant Farm
spec: Canvas ants wandering with simple steering, follow toward food you place by clicking. Calm sim.

title: Theremin
spec: WebAudio oscillator: mouse X=pitch, Y=volume. Visual feedback wave. The spooky sci-fi instrument.

title: Mini Piano
spec: One-octave+ piano playable by mouse and computer keyboard (a-k keys). WebAudio tones, key highlight.

title: Step Sequencer
blurb: Lay down a beat in 16 steps.
spec: 16-step sequencer grid x 4 drum sounds (synthesized via WebAudio noise/osc). Play/stop, tempo slider.

title: More Cowbell
spec: Big cowbell button that clonks (WebAudio) on click; cowbell shakes; counter; 'I gotta have more' meter.

title: Noise Mixer
spec: WebAudio noise generators: white/pink/rain-ish, with volume sliders to mix. Play/stop. Calming UI.

title: Melody Generator
spec: Generate and play a random short melody from a pentatonic scale via WebAudio. 'New tune' + visual notes.

title: Tone Tester
blurb: How high can you still hear?
spec: WebAudio sine at a frequency you set with a slider (20Hz-20kHz). Play/stop, shows Hz, hearing-range hints.

title: Beatbox Pads
spec: 6 launchpad-style pads each firing a synthesized vocal-ish drum sound (WebAudio). Keyboard-triggerable, glow on hit.

title: Whale Song
spec: WebAudio slow swooping low oscillators with reverb-ish detune to mimic whale calls. 'Sing' button, underwater theme.

title: Most Annoying Sound
spec: A button that plays the world's most annoying sound (rising WebAudio screech). Counter of how long you endured. Comedy.

title: Binary Clock
spec: Live binary clock: columns of dots for H/M/S in BCD. Toggle to show decimal. Mono retro look.

title: Word Clock
spec: Letter grid that lights up words spelling the current time to the nearest five minutes ('IT IS ... PAST/TO ...').

title: Breathing Bubble
blurb: In four, hold seven, out eight.
spec: A circle that expands/holds/contracts guiding 4-7-8 breathing with text cues. Calming gradient, start/stop.

title: Tomato Timer
spec: Pomodoro timer with a tomato that drains; 25/5 cycles, start/pause/reset, gentle WebAudio chime at end.

title: Metronome
spec: Visual + audible metronome, BPM slider/tap-tempo, swinging pendulum, accent on beat 1. WebAudio click.

title: Age in Seconds
spec: Enter your birthdate; shows your age live-ticking in seconds (and days/heartbeats). Slightly existential fun.

title: Countdown to Anything
blurb: Tick down to your big moment.
spec: Enter a target date+label; shows live D/H/M/S countdown. Celebrate (confetti) when it hits zero.

title: Is It Friday Yet?
spec: Giant YES/NO based on current day; if not, shows time left until Friday 5pm with a sad-to-hyped meter.

title: Time Wasted Here
spec: Counts seconds since the page loaded, ticking up, with escalating sarcastic commentary at milestones.

title: Joke Doomsday Clock
spec: A clock fixed near midnight; click 'recalculate' and it jitters to a new silly 'seconds to midnight' with absurd reasons.

title: The Useless Button
spec: A big tempting button that, when clicked, does increasingly pointless theatrical 'nothing' (dodges, fake errors, shrugs). Click counter.

title: Do Not Press
blurb: You will press it. We both know.
spec: A forbidden button; each press escalates comedic consequences/warnings (screen shake, fake alarms, ever-bigger text). Press count.

title: Nothing
blurb: Finally, a place to do nothing.
spec: A deliberately near-empty zen page. Tracks how long you've successfully done nothing; any interaction resets it. Minimalist.

title: Pet the Cat
spec: A cat (CSS/emoji) you pet by hovering/dragging; a purr meter fills, hearts float, occasional meow text. Pure serotonin.

title: Cookie Clicker
blurb: Click cookie. Get cookies. Why? Yes.
spec: Click a big cookie to earn cookies; one cheap auto-clicker upgrade ('Grandma'). Number-go-up. Saves to localStorage.

title: The Procrastinator
blurb: A to-do list that does it for you.
spec: Add tasks; instead of doing them, the app comedically 'handles' them by deleting them with excuses. Anti-productivity.

title: Catch the Gnome
blurb: A button that refuses to be caught.
spec: A gnome button that darts away from your cursor; difficulty rises as you near it. Catch it for a goofy victory. Timer.

title: Retro Hit Counter
spec: A nostalgic odometer-style visitor counter (localStorage) + 'best viewed in Netscape' badges + a tiny guestbook gag. 90s glory.

title: Under Construction
spec: Generates a classic 'Under Construction' 90s page: animated digger emoji, marquee, random 'last updated' date, spinning gifs vibe via CSS.

title: GeoCities Generator
spec: One button generates a randomized hideous 90s homepage (tiled background, comic sans, rainbow text, marquee, midi-note). Regenerate.

title: Awkward Silence Timer
spec: Start/stop timer that, as it runs, displays escalating awkwardness commentary and a sweat meter. Comedy stopwatch.

title: Yelling Meter
blurb: How loud can you actually get?
spec: Uses mic (getUserMedia) loudness to fill a meter and unlock 'yelling tiers' with funny labels. Graceful fallback if denied.

title: Deep Quote Poster
spec: Generates a meaningless 'inspirational' quote over a random gradient/sunset, Instagram-poster styled. New quote button.

title: Fake Headline Generator
spec: Generates a ridiculous but harmless news headline (clearly satirical) in a newspaper layout with a fake byline + date.

title: Whack-a-Mole
blurb: Bonk the critters, beat the clock.
spec: Grid of holes; moles pop up randomly, click to whack for points. 30s timer, score, speeds up. Bonk feedback.

title: Reaction Time
blurb: Wait for green. Don't jump early.
spec: Screen turns red then (random delay) green; click ASAP, measures ms. Penalize early clicks. Best score saved.

title: Click Speed Test
spec: Click as fast as possible for 5s; shows clicks and CPS with a rank label. Restart. Big tappable area.

title: Memory Match
spec: Grid of face-down emoji cards; flip two, match to keep, win when all matched. Move counter + timer. Shuffle on restart.

title: Tic-Tac-Toe
spec: Tic-tac-toe vs a decent CPU (blocks/wins via simple heuristic or minimax). Win/draw detection, scoreboard, reset.

title: Simon Says
spec: Four colored pads light up in a growing sequence with WebAudio tones; repeat it back. Level counter, fail = game over.

title: Snake
spec: Classic snake on a canvas grid, arrow/WASD controls, food grows snake, wall/self collision ends. Score + high score.

title: Hangman
blurb: Guess the word, save the stick man.
spec: Hangman with a fun built-in word list; on-screen + keyboard letters, ASCII/canvas gallows draws on misses. Win/lose, new word.

title: Typing Speed Test
spec: Shows a sample sentence; type it in a box; measures WPM and accuracy live, finishes when matched. New sentence button.

title: Maze Runner
blurb: Find your way out, no peeking.
spec: Generates a random maze on canvas (DFS), player dot navigates with arrow keys to the exit. Timer, 'new maze' button.

title: Dodge the Blocks
spec: Move a ship left/right (mouse/keys) to dodge falling blocks on canvas; survival timer as score, speeds up, game over + restart.
